scoringPlays.text: Griffin Wilde 23 Yd pass from Preston Stone (Jack Olsen Kick)
Caleb Komolafe 2 Yd Run (Jack Olsen Kick)
Lawson Albright 23 Yd pass from Preston Stone (Jack Olsen Kick)
Braden Turner 47 Yd Fumble Return (Jack Olsen PAT failed)
Griffin Wilde 11 Yd pass from Preston Stone (Jack Olsen Kick)
Brock Townsend 3 Yd pass from Joe Labas (Cade Graham Kick)

videos.headline: Central Michigan's defense comes up with early 4th-down stop
videos.description: Northwestern decides to go for it on fourth down, but comes up short, giving the ball to Central Michigan with great field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Central Michigan's defense comes up with early 4th-down stop) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Preston Stone finds Griffin Wilde for 23-yard TD
videos.description: Griffin Wilde hauls in a 23-yard pass from Preston Stone in the end zone for a Northwestern touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Preston Stone finds Griffin Wilde for 23-yard TD) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Braden Turner comes up with amazing INT for Northwestern
videos.description: Angel Flores is picked off by Braden Turner with an amazing one-handed grab.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Braden Turner comes up with amazing INT for Northwestern) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Caleb Komolafe powers in for 2-yard Northwestern TD
videos.description: Caleb Komolafe takes the handoff right up the middle and into the end zone for six.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caleb Komolafe powers in for 2-yard Northwestern TD) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Preston Stone and Lawson Albright connect for 23-yard TD
videos.description: Lawson Albright catches a 23-yard strike from Preston Stone in the end zone to extend Northwestern's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Preston Stone and Lawson Albright connect for 23-yard TD) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Braden Turner finds end zone for Northwestern on a 47-yard scoop-and-score
videos.description: Angel Flores fumbles the football and Braden Turner is there to return it 47 yards to the house.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Braden Turner finds end zone for Northwestern on a 47-yard scoop-and-score) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Preston Stone finds Griffin Wilde for their 2nd TD connection of the game
videos.description: Preston Stone's 11-yard touchdown pass to Griffin Wilde extends Northwestern's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Preston Stone finds Griffin Wilde for their 2nd TD connection of the game) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Central Michigan's Langston Lewis makes incredible grab
videos.description: Langston Lewis comes down with an acrobatic catch to set up first-and-goal for Central Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Central Michigan's Langston Lewis makes incredible grab) 2025/12/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brock Townsend gets Central Michigan on the board with 3-yard TD
videos.description: Joe Labas and Brock Townsend connect on a 3-yard touchdown pass to get Central Michigan its first points of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brock Townsend gets Central Michigan on the board with 3-yard TD) 2025/12/26 ESHEET
